feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: How to enable Country Specific Pricing Procedure in Service Contracts
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

Can you please guide us as to how to enable Country Specific Pricing Procedures regarding Service Contracts?

Thanks!


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Vendor consignment stock consumption for outbound delivery
entry.content:
Good Afternoon, 

We have a business requirement as explained below:

Our customer wants to sell the vendor consignment stock directly without doing any transfer posting. As per standard, we have done the required configuration, but while doing an outbound delivery, the system is not considering the vendor consignment stock.

It would be great if someone has any idea about this issue or whether this is feasible in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system

Thank You  

#SAP S/4HANA cloud Public Edition Sales 

@Gerhard_Welker , @SubhashreeSahoo

entry.title: Default Attachment Document Type - Purchase Requisition
entry.content:
We would like to set the default Attachment Document Type for Purchase Requisitions to Internal Use (SL9). 

We have not found any Configuration options so for in S/4HANA Public Cloud.

Has anyone been able to set this?

entry.title: Change the value in header level based on item level supplier value in outgoing payments tile
entry.content:
I want to change / substitute the the header level reference field based on the supplier account which is in item level. FIN_CODING_BLOCK_SUBSTITUTION is for item level substitution only. Then how it is possible to change the header value based on item level field value ?.. .pls give me a solution.

 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: How to Trigger a PPF action to Print Handling unit label from fiori/API
entry.content:
Hi members,

My requirement is a web API where we need to trigger a PPF to Print Handling Unit Label and to create a spool for each request that is processed and also, we need to have the reprint option also.

Please let me know how I can achieve it and if you can share anything related references.

Thanks,
Bharath

entry.title: Create Multiple HU for 1 Qty with UOM SET/EA in Inbound delivery
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We have a business requirement as explained below:

Our customer wants to receive the Material with UOM 'SET' of Qty 1 packed in the 5 carton and stored in the 5 different HU's. And also while goods issue to the sales order 5HU needs to be picked for the delivery.

Example: Sofa Set with packed into the 5 different packing.

In the SAP, Inbound delivery process system allow us to create 1 HU for 1 Set. 

It would be great if someone has any idea about this issue or whether this is feasible in the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition system

Thank you.

entry.title: Extraction for all BP the data related to the credit limit
entry.content:
The business needs urgently to have an extraction for all BP of the data related to the credit limit


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud Edition / Recieve E-Invoices
entry.content:
Hallo Experts,

i have a question regarding the ability to recieve e-invoices (for example X-Rechnung here in Germany) in the Public Cloud.
So far we have implemented the sending of X-Rechnung via Email in our TDD System, but what if the company wants to recieve an invoice from a supplier who also sends it from its Public Cloud System via Email (in the X-Rechnung format).
What is the Best Practice for this Scenario ? How can we import this supplier invoice (which is a XML-File) from the email and create it in the Public Cloud manually or even automatically ? 
SAP DRC doesnt seem to offer this functionality yet. Can we leverage Central Invoice Management or SAP Buisness Network ?
Thanks in advance for all suggestions.

Best regards
Lukas

entry.title: Inquiry Regarding Sources of Supply
entry.content:
Dear SAP Support,

We are seeking clarification regarding the Source of Supply determination logic in SAP Public Cloud. Currently, the system appears to prioritize purchase contracts over purchasing info records when determining the source of supply.

Is there a way to modify this logic so that purchasing info records are prioritized instead of purchase contracts?

Thank you for your assistance.

Best regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Display Authorization Trace for Multiple Users
entry.content:
Hello SAP,

Is it possible to activate authorization trace for multiple users in S/4HANA cloud public edition?

Regards.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4 HANA Public Cloud - EWM How to start an ABAP report e. g. /SCWM/R_INITIALSTOCKUPLOAD
entry.content: As Public Cloud does only interacting via UI5 / Fiori APPS, I am as a consultant looking for a way to start a "standard" report in case there is no Fiori APP existing (e. g. for EWM transaction /SCWM/ISU). As an example for an report I would like to execute /SCWM/R_INITIALSTOCKUPLOAD.

entry.title: Creating address of any existing bp using API in SAP Hana Public cloud& cl_http_destination_provider
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have developed an app using RAP. When I try to create Address using 'A_BusinessPartnerAddress' of Business Partner ( A2X ) of an existing BP that does not have an address, it is giving me the following message:

Error Message "Internal error when calling operation module BUA_CHECK_ADDRESS_VALIDITY_ALL; a check table is missing" 

code: R11/243

I have gone through the KBA 3109298 and it is the same problem. follow the url for more details.

url:  https://me.sap.com/notes/3109298/E

But here they only explain it for POST request payload.

I am using class cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement for creating the destination and Service Consumption Model to create the address there is no way to add any association to use Address Usage  that I can find.

 

My Code : 

METHOD if_oo_adt_classrun~main.
DATA:
ls_business_data TYPE zpatient_reg_scom=>tys_a_business_partner_addre_2,
lo_http_client TYPE REF TO if_web_http_client,
lo_client_proxy TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_client_proxy,
lo_request TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_request_create,
lo_response TYPE REF TO /iwbep/if_cp_response_create.

TRY.
DATA(v_guid) = cl_system_uuid=>if_system_uuid_static~create_uuid_c32( ).
CATCH cx_uuid_error INTO DATA(r_uuid_exc).
ENDTRY.
TRY.
" Create http client
TRY.
DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
comm_scenario = 'ZTEST' ).
CATCH cx_http_dest_provider_error.
"handle exception
ENDTRY.

lo_http_client = cl_web_http_client_manager=>create_by_http_destination( lo_destination ).
lo_client_proxy = /iwbep/cl_cp_factory_remote=>create_v2_remote_proxy(
EXPORTING
is_proxy_model_key = VALUE #( repository_id = 'DEFAULT'
proxy_model_id = 'ZPATIENT_REG_SCOM'
proxy_model_version = '0001' )
io_http_client = lo_http_client
iv_relative_service_root = '' ).

ASSERT lo_http_client IS BOUND.

* Prepare business data
ls_business_data = VALUE #(
business_partner = '14013'
validity_start_date = 20240916123000
validity_end_date = 99990101123000
address_uuid = v_guid
city_name = 'Berhampore'
country = 'IN'
language = 'EN'
pobox = '733121'
pobox_postal_code = '733121'
postal_code = '733121'
region = 'WB'
street_name = 'TEST'
).

" Navigate to the resource and create a request for the create operation
lo_request = lo_client_proxy->create_resource_for_entity_set( 'A_BUSINESS_PARTNER_ADDRESS' )->create_request_for_create( ).
" Set the business data for the created entity
lo_request->set_business_data( ls_business_data ).
" Execute the request
lo_response = lo_request->execute( ).
" Get the after image
*lo_response->get_business_data( IMPORTING es_business_data = ls_business_data ).
CATCH /iwbep/cx_cp_remote INTO DATA(lx_remote).  I am getting error here... Please note if I try to create the BP address manually then If i create it from code its working fine. Default address Usage issue I know but My question is how to solve the issue using KBA 3109298 for my scenario
" Handle remote Exception
" It contains details about the problems of your http(s) connection


CATCH /iwbep/cx_gateway INTO DATA(lx_gateway).
" Handle Exception

CATCH cx_web_http_client_error INTO DATA(lx_web_http_client_error).
" Handle Exception
RAISE SHORTDUMP lx_web_http_client_error.

ENDTRY.
ENDMETHOD.

entry.title: Transfer of Payment file to SFTP via Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello All,

I'm seeking advice on how to establish a connectivity path for transferring payment files Via public cloud to clients SFTP. After executing the automatic payment program on public cloud , when payment is posted successfully I'm getting output of file in 'Payment Media' from where i can easily download the file.

After downloading the file from payment media, I upload it manually to the portal provided by the bank. This manual process works fine, but my client wants the file to be sent to its SFTP. Is there a way to automate this process?

The standard solution provided by SAP is 1EG, which is not applicable for Australia. Other scope items, 16R and 2YM, are licensed, and the client does not want to use them. 

Is there a solution other than 1EG, 16R, and 2YM that can be used to establish a connectivity path for transferring payment files via public cloud to clients' SFTP? I need to know the best possible way out which I can use for integration.

entry.title: Create org structure at S4 Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Is there any way to create HR structure and Employees at S4H Public Cloud rather than the replication? Org unit , and positions and there relations with employees.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Send Notification for the Approval After the downpayment for the sales order is done In public cloud
entry.content:
Hii Experts

I'm trying to send a notification to the approver once the downpayment is done for the sales order in S4HANA Public Cloud . How can I do this? Please Help me with this .

Thanks in Advance

Shraddha

entry.title: eDelivery Cancellation Turkey - Status
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

We need your help for the eDelivery integration for Turkey.

We are receiving a "Not Found" response code from our provider and are trying to map it to "Cancelled" in SAP CPI. Within the "Cancelled" status, the eDelivery can be cancelled in the eDocument cockpit and the GI reversed.  But we haven’t been successful in implementing this mapping. Does anyone have experience with remapping status codes in CPI? Any guidance or tips would be appreciated.

Thank you very much and best regards,

Annika

entry.title: Sales Order price is updated from sales contract after approval instead of custom logic in pricing
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are using SAP S/4HANA public cloud version and we have enabled custom business object to enable customized sales pricing in sales order. 

Following are the steps we have done and it is surprising to note that Sales Order price is updated from sales contract after approval instead of custom logic in pricing.

Step 1 : custom business logic for sales pricing for materials 

Step 2: Sales Contract creation 

Step 3: Sales Order with reference to sales contract 

Step 3 : Sales Order approval

Observation : Sales pricing  for material in Sales Order is getting updated from sales contract instead of customized logic for pricing. 

Sales Contract 

 

custom business logic 

Sales Order creation 

 

Sales Order approval

After sales Order approval 

sales order approval action is impacting our custom logic for sales price and the sales price for material in sales order is picking up from sales contract. 

Could you please advise on how to avoid the sales price copying from sales contract. 

Our requirement is to pull the sales price only from customized business object. 

Please advise. 

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Manage Material Valuations App on S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content:
Dear Community,

“Manage Material Valuations” (App ID: F2680) is a frequently used App to Debit/Credit material’s inventory value in the CO-PC module. Our customer needs to reevaluate more than ten thousand materials in a short time via this app.

This app’s user interface allows document creation only for one material at a time which means it will take too long for thousands of materials. We were using the LSMW tool to shorten this process on the On-Premise platform until now.

The question is, do we have a similar tool like LSMW to use on the “Manage Material Valuations” app in the Public Cloud platform? We need to reevaluate all materials at once via data import or using Excel upload method.

Thanks,
Evrim

entry.title: Multiplying Standard Values of the Work Center Formula While Calculating Standard Cost Estimate
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,
We are using the S4/HANA Public Cloud Edition in our system, and while calculating standard cost estimates, the system multiplies the quantities of the standard values of the activity's work center formula. However, we expect it to only multiply the variable values of the formula. Below is the routing for the material and the master data for the work center formula.

Standard Values of the Material's Routing:

For 1 kg of material, we schedule 4 minutes for setup time (Standard Value), 10 minutes for machine time, and 15 minutes for labor time. This means our calculation for a 2.5 kg unit of material should consist of 4 minutes for setup (Standard Value), 25 minutes for machine time, and 37.5 minutes for labor time.

Work Center Formula:

Based on our formula and the routing, the quantity calculation for the cost estimate for a 2.5 kg unit of material should be as follows:
4 minutes (Setup time) + [37.5 (Labor Time) x 1 (Operation Quantity) / 1 (Base Quantity) / 1 (Operation Splits)] = 41.5 minutes


Here is the system's calculation :

(4 minutes Setup time x 2.5 = 10 minutes, and 15 minutes x 2.5 = 37.5 minutes)
The system divides the calculation based on the standard and variable values of the formula and multiplies both values, while we expect it to only multiply the variable values of the formula.

Additionally, for make-to-order materials, the system calculates the standard cost estimates for the Sales Document correctly. However, we couldn't find any different options for the material cost calculation variant.

entry.title: No JE for Use tax on Supplier invoice
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I am facing an issue with Use Tax JE on the supplier invoice. When I create a supplier invoice with a GL line item and use the tax code 'U1' for booking the use tax, the system doesn't calculate the use tax at all. It does recognize the Use tax, but tax is not calculate and a separate line on the JE doesn't show up.

I am trying to figure out if this is related to some kind of a configuration. This is the first time i am coming across this issue. I have looked at the starter system which works the way it should. 

Let me know if anyone of you have come across this issue.

Regards,

Chintan

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance
